Got a question abt castor, is he able to proc corruption damage? Or is it supposed to be procced by another unit
I'm still tryna figure out how he works
castor cannot proc his own corrosion, it has to be another character
though passive damage like tentacles will proc corrosion at half amount
So more hits or bigger hits better
amount of hits doesn't matter, it's based on damage dealt
Why is he paired w jenkin then, I dunno how to use jenoin
10 hits of 1,000 and one hit of 10,000 have no difference when it comes to activation corrosion
jenkin rouse/exalt provides teamwide buffs, even though it sounds like the crit buffs are for her
jenkin is primarily there to give castor like 100%+ crit damage to massively boost him
Who procs his stacks then
Ik jenkin has a X damage card
Does damage amp apply before tentacle damage for tentacles like it does strength for normal attacks?
jenkins probably but in a team like that castor is the main dps
yes
Hi ows castor a main DPs if he needs someone to help proc corrosion

He deals enough damage by himself at E3 to become a main dps. His E3 enables him so that every 3 Onyx Plume played, He Gains Addition 10% Final Dmg and 1 Arithma. Combine that with his E2 which enables him to spam his Exalt for Infinite Onyx Plumes, and you get a crazy strong DPS.
can you downgrade items like ascension materials? the event gives purples but I still need blues, I have to farm them on the side I guess? only noticed upgrading 3:1

You can't
Gold shop buy green then up it to blue
oh right gold shop ty that'll save me some stamina
Then farm event for gold

At E2 or below, Castor is more of Shield/Support. He can block a-lot of damage via Onyx Plumes, and his Exalt. He can apply Corrosion for your Sub-Dps to Proc, and ideally a Sub-Dps that deals alot of damage to eat up all of Castor’s Corrosion stacks. Jenkin is a good one due to her nature to buff Castor’s Crit Dmg, while dealing sufficient damage to eat up all Castor’s Corrosion. Pollux is a interesting case due to how they work together when put on the same team. Even if Castor is E2, he still does a hefty amount of damage as long as you can stack Onyx Plumes in your hand. Overtime that falls off of course, and you need E3.
